meaning: vt.使用于操作,使开始运转,实施
examples: While much work remains, trends in recent years indicate the PLA is beginning to operationalize its modern force, taking on new and more challenging missions.
The analysts need to operationalize soft goals into implementable requirements.
It is about how you operationalize and subsequently capitalize on market opportunity.
So far they are making it easier to operationalize advanced defenses against targeted attacks.
What APIs can be published to operationalize these signals by allowing action to be taken?
